questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: Which of the following diagrams best depicts the relationship between Males, Husbands and Doctors?

questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: Which of the following diagram best depicts the relationship between Females, Mothers and Infants?

solutions.solution: All husbands are males. Also, some husbands and some males can be doctors. This relationship can be expressed as given in option (a).
All mothers are females. Also, some infants are females but infants can not be mothers. This can be expressed as given in option (c).
